nasb.text: You will profane yourself in the sight of the nations, and you will know that I am the Lord.” ’ ”

esv.text: And you shall be profaned by your own doing in the sight of the nations, and you shall know that I am the Lord.”

cnv.text: 你在列國眼前被玷污的時候，你就知道我是耶和華。’”

ccb.text: 你必在列国面前受凌辱，你便知道我是耶和华。’”
